query:
SELECT s.id, s.sceneIndex, s.status, s.taskId, s.errorMessage, s.updatedAt,
       COUNT(p.id) AS providerLogs,
       MAX(p.createdAt) AS lastProviderLog
FROM musicVideoScenes s
LEFT JOIN providerJobLogs p ON p.sceneId = s.id AND p.status IN ('submitted','pending')
WHERE s.jobId = 450002
  AND s.status IN ('generating','pending')
GROUP BY s.id
ORDER BY s.sceneIndex;
